chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI. C.P No. D-48 of 2026 ____________________________________________________________ Dated Order with signature of Judge. ____________________________________________________________ Hearing 1. For order on office objection 2. For hearing of CMA No.187/2026 3. For hearing of main case 30.01.2026. Mr. Zaheem Haider, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Khalid Mehmood Rajpar, Advocate for the Respondent Nos.3 & 5. Mr. Muhammad Akbar Khan A.A.G a/w Muhammad Hassan, Deputy Director Plant Protection Department. --------------- After making certain preliminary submissions, counsel for the Petitioner invites attention to the application made by the Petitioner to the Director General of Plant Protection vide letter dated 19.12.2025 (Annexure A-12 at Page 77 of the Court file) and submits that the Petitioner would be satisfied if such application were decided in accordance with law after hearing the Petitioner through a speaking Order without undue delay. The officer from the Department of Plant Protection undertakes that the application would be decided accordingly within a period of two weeks. Let the needful be ensured. The Petition stands disposed of in such terms. JUDGE JUDGE TariqAli/PS
